startStoring: Start storing your passwords in a YubiKey-encrypted KeePassage database
tapToComplete:
Tap your YubiKey sensor
to complete the operation
dbMinimiseLock: Lock database after minimising the window
areYouSureReset: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default?
enterPinFor: Enter PIN for YubiKey with serial number
title: Title
fillInDisplayName: Please fill in the display name and an optional description for your new database:
pleasePlugInKey:
Please plug in the YubiKey keys you would like to pair with this database and tick the "Paired" checkbox.
It is recommended to add at least two keys, so that one can serve as a backup.
beforeUsingGenerateKey: Before using a YubiKey with this program, you need to generate an ECDSA P-256 key in the PIV applet.
pleaseSelectSlot: Please plug in YubiKey and select the slot you would like to configure. If you are already using age with YubiKey, you can select an occupied slot to override its key and certificate.
areYouSureDeleteCert: Are you sure you want to delete the certificate from slot {}? This is irreversible and you won't be able to decrypt secrets using this certificate.
youHaveOnlySelected1: You have only selected 1 key. It is highly recommended to pair at least 2 keys so that one can serve as a backup.
pleaseConnectCorrectKey: Please connect the correct YubiKey with one of the following serial numbers
pleaseSelectEntryToEdit: Please select an entry you would like to edit
pleaseSelectEntryToDelete: Please select an entry you would like to delete
cannotDeleteEntryDoesNotExist: Cannot delete this entry as it does not exist
areYouSureDeleteEntry: Are you sure you want to delete entry

yubikey_status_words.BYTES_REMAINING: More data is available and can be retrieved.
yubikey_status_words.NO_INPUT_DATA: No input data was available from the device.
yubikey_status_words.WRONG_LENGTH: The provided data length is incorrect.
yubikey_status_words.NO_SPACE: No space available on the device.
yubikey_status_words.INCORRECT_SLOT: The selected slot is invalid or unsupported.
yubikey_status_words.NOT_SUPPORTED: This command is not supported by the device.
